text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, surprised, huh? I know, I'm really good at
playing dead! I did it all the time as a kid, playing
superhero with my friends.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I laid down like I was defeated, and when my foe
came over... BAM! Surprise attack!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: I was actually too good at it. One time someone thought it was for real and ran to get an adult... Wanna see me do it again?
